If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!!

Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: 
--------------------------------------
- 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass
- Easy learning of modes
- Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●)
- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players
- Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. 
- This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. 

●●●●● App Features: 
------------------ 
● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes!
● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps 
● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort 
● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger
● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer
● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice
● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) 
● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable)
● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key  
● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo
● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning 
● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from 
● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice
● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable)
● designed both for iPhone and iPad

● iOS 10 and up compatible
 
For support and full documentation on this and other our products please visit our website: 
---------------------------------- 
http://www.fonexsis.com
---------------------------------- 

With respect, 
Fonexsis Creative Group.

cn.description:
Notteka 是一款专为高效会议而生的AI会议记录应用，帮助你轻松录音、精准转写、智能总结，让会议记录不再是负担。 
  
  核心功能：                                                                                                          
                                                                    
  【实时录音转写】                                                                                                    
  一键录音，AI实时将语音转为文字。支持普通话、粤语、英语、日语四种语言，满足多语言会议场景。
                                                                                                                      
  【AI智能摘要】                                                                                                      
  会议结束后，AI自动生成结构化会议摘要。多种摘要模版可选，快速提炼会议重点、待办事项和决议内容。                      
                                                                                                                      
  【音视频文件导入】                                                
  支持从本地或其它APP导入音频、视频文件，自动完成转写，让已有的录音也能快速变成文字记录。                             
                                                                                                                      
  【AI对话助手】                               
  针对会议内容进行AI对话，快速获取关键信息，追问细节，让会议内容随时可查可问。                                        
                                                                                                                      
  【便捷管理】                                 
  - 会议记录按时间自动分组，一目了然                                                                                  
  - 支持搜索、编辑、分享、复制                                                                                        
  - 文件夹分类管理，井井有条                   
                                                                                                                      
  【多语言界面】                                                                                                      
  应用界面支持简体中文、粤语、英语、日语，适配不同地区用户。                                                          
                                                                                                                      
  无论是工作会议、课堂讲座、访谈记录还是灵感备忘，Notteka都是你的智能会议伙伴。

cn.description:
行星小时数基于古老的占星系统，即迦勒底行星。
行星小时数由太阳系的7个可见行星控制。 按照查尔达顺序，行星按以下顺序排列：土星，木星，火星，太阳，金星，水星和月球。 每个行星控制小时，相应地属于小时。
每个行星都有其自身的特征和能量，这些特征和能量在相关的时间段内清晰地显示出来。
考虑到行星的影响范围，在某些行星小时上执行的特定问题会变得更好或更坏。
选择一个有利的时间来制定计划，同时考虑行星时间，您将保持成功和快乐！

《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

hk.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

《Halls of Torment》是一款生存遊戲，畫面採用預先渲染的復古風，類似於1990年代晚期的角色扮演遊戲。從多名英雄角色中選擇一名操控，並進入致命的苦痛殿堂闖蕩。對抗不潔的恐怖生物，並在敵人一波波的攻勢下努力求生，直到其中一位苦痛領主登場。使用角色特長、技能和物品強化英雄。在闖關過程中打造全新強力流派。探索地底的各個地方，尋找全新強力物品，讓你能夠闖入更黑暗的深淵。

2023年Steam年度最佳肉鸽遊戲Halls of Torment現已上線移動端，快來加入這場90年代復古風格ARPG的生存挑戰吧！

【遊戲特色】
◆闖關只要30分鐘，輕鬆又快速
◆ 經典預先渲染美術風格
◆ 任務導向的遊戲進程
◆ 多種不同的技能、特長和物品可供選擇，讓你搭配出有趣的組合
◆ 各種不同的頭目，主打獨特機製和攻擊模式
◆ 多名各具特色的角色，讓你能夠體驗多種玩法
◆ 解鎖並探索多個有趣且高難度的地底世界
◆ 可送回遊戲主世界並用於後續闖關的獨特物品
◆ 調製魔法藥水，讓命運女神祝你一臂之力
◆ 解鎖各個職業的力量，並和你指定的角色結合
◆ 找到稀有版本的物品，進一步優化你的流派配置

【完整內容清單】 
◆6個關卡，環境各具特色
◆13名可扮演角色和角色印記
◆超過20種祝福，能在闖關過程中使你強大

hk.description:
Escape your childhood fears.

First available on PC and consoles, the horror adventure tale Little Nightmares is available on mobile!
 Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears!
Help Six escape The Maw – a vast, mysterious vessel inhabited by corrupted souls looking for their next meal.
As you progress on your journey, explore the most disturbing dollhouse offering a prison to escape from and a playground full of secrets to discover.
Reconnect with your inner child to unleash your imagination and find the way out!
Little Nightmares features a subtle mix of action and puzzle-platformer mechanics rooted in an eerie artistic direction and creepy sound design.
Sneak your way out of the Maw’s dreary maze and run from its corrupted inhabitants to escape your childhood fears. 

FEATURES

- Tiptoe your way through a dark and thrilling adventure
- Rediscover your childhood fears inside a haunting vessel and escape its eerie inhabitants
- Climb, crawl and hide through nightmarish environments to solve tricky platform puzzles
- Immerse yourself in the Maw through its creepy sound design

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- Compatible with MFi controllers

If you run into a problem, please contact us at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ with as much information as possible on the issue.

行星小時數基於古老的占星系統，即迦勒底行星。
行星小時數由太陽系的7個可見行星控制。 按照查爾達順序，行星按以下順序排列：土星，木星，火星，太陽，金星，水星和月球。 每個行星控制小時，相應地屬於小時。
每個行星都有其自身的特徵和能量，這些特徵和能量在相關的時間段內清晰地顯示出來。
考慮到行星的影響範圍，在某些行星小時上執行的特定問題會變得更好或更壞。
選擇一個有利的時間來製定計劃，同時考慮行星時間，您將保持成功和快樂！

hk.trackName: Road to Empress - 盛世天下 媚娘篇
hk.releaseNotes: 《隱形守護者》團隊New One Studio全新力作
hk.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

mo.description:
阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。

【能力与场景】
• 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准）
• AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论）
• 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准）
• 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致）

【说明】
本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

4/5 – Hardcoregamer

mo.description:
Play MONOPOLY on the go without distractions – no ads, no fuss! 

Challenge friends, family and fans from around the globe in the digital version of the official MONOPOLY board game, licensed by Hasbro. 

Head online to play your favourite board game with anyone, anywhere, at any time, or compete against state-of-the-art AI opponents offline. Plus, with the seamless PASS & PLAY mode, you can play the classic MONOPOLY board game with your friends with just one device! 

The classic MONOPOLY board game takes a bold leap into a new format, arriving on mobile with amazing graphics, smooth animations and a catchy soundtrack! 


HOW TO PLAY MONOPOLY

1. Download the official MONOPOLY app
2. Press “PLAY”
3. Pick a mode, board, dice and token
4. Roll the dice and move around the board
5. If you land on a property tile, you can buy it
6. Collect rent when other players land on it
7. Continue around the board, drawing cards when instructed – will you be hit with a surprise tax? Sent to jail? Or get a little bonus money? 
8. If you run out of money, you’ll be bankrupt and out of the game
9. The last player left with a profit wins! 

FEATURES

- MONOPOLY ON THE GO – No connection? No problem. Our roster of AI opponents are ready to challenge you! Or play with your friends offline with Pass & Play! 
- MULTIPLE MODES – Take on AI opponents in Single Player or compete against friends and family in Pass & Play or Online With Friends. Try out Online Multiplayer and face off against fellow tycoons from around the world! 
- EXCLUSIVE BOARDS – Experience the iconic board game like never before with exclusive boards and more! 
- AWESOME NEW TOKENS AND DICE – Whatever your style, MONOPOLY has a set of dice fit for a future tycoon! Pick from nostalgic classic tokens or brand-new designs exclusive to the mobile game.

Get the most authentic MONOPOLY experience with the official MONOPOLY mobile game!

mo.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：
不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

《Halls of Torment》是一款生存遊戲，畫面採用預先渲染的復古風，類似於1990年代晚期的角色扮演遊戲。從多名英雄角色中選擇一名操控，並進入致命的苦痛殿堂闖蕩。對抗不潔的恐怖生物，並在敵人一波波的攻勢下努力求生，直到其中一位苦痛領主登場。使用角色特長、技能和物品強化英雄。在闖關過程中打造全新強力流派。探索地底的各個地方，尋找全新強力物品，讓你能夠闖入更黑暗的深淵。

2023年Steam年度最佳肉鸽遊戲Halls of Torment現已上線移動端，快來加入這場90年代復古風格ARPG的生存挑戰吧！

【遊戲特色】
◆闖關只要30分鐘，輕鬆又快速
◆ 經典預先渲染美術風格
◆ 任務導向的遊戲進程

◆ 解鎖各個職業的力量，並和你指定的角色結合
◆ 找到稀有版本的物品，進一步優化你的流派配置

【完整內容清單】

First available on PC and consoles, the horror adventure tale Little Nightmares is available on mobile!
 Immerse yourself in Little Nightmares, a dark whimsical tale that will confront you with your childhood fears!
Help Six escape The Maw – a vast, mysterious vessel inhabited by corrupted souls looking for their next meal.

Reconnect with your inner child to unleash your imagination and find the way out!
Little Nightmares features a subtle mix of action and puzzle-platformer mechanics rooted in an eerie artistic direction and creepy sound design.
Sneak your way out of the Maw’s dreary maze and run from its corrupted inhabitants to escape your childhood fears. 

FEATURES

- Tiptoe your way through a dark and thrilling adventure
- Rediscover your childhood fears inside a haunting vessel and escape its eerie inhabitants
- Climb, crawl and hide through nightmarish environments to solve tricky platform puzzles
- Immerse yourself in the Maw through its creepy sound design

CAREFULLY REDESIGNED FOR MOBILE

- Revamped interface
- Game Center achievements
- Compatible with MFi controllers

If you run into a problem, please contact us at https://playdigious.helpshift.com/hc/en/12-playdigious/ with as much information as possible on the issue.

mo.releaseNotes: 《隱形守護者》團隊New One Studio全新力作
mo.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

tw.description:
阿福出境管家帮助你理清「这次出境前要准备什么」：是否需要签证、如何准备材料、风险与薄弱环节在哪里，以及保险、入境与行前事项等参考信息。

【能力与场景】
• 覆盖 9 个热门出境目的地（含美国、英国、加拿大、申根、澳大利亚、日本、韩国、新西兰、新加坡等，具体以应用内列表为准）
• AI 签证风险评估：多步问卷，输出通过/拒签风险相关维度的参考分析（非官方结论）
• 工具与攻略：材料清单、申请时间线、多国对比、签证百科类内容；部分目的地含深度报告/付费增值能力（以应用内为准）
• 出境准备向模块：围绕 签证、保险、入境、行前清单、落地出行 等方向组织（与关于页一致）

【说明】
本应用非使领馆或政府机构官方应用，评估与建议仅供准备参考；签证是否签发以使领馆最终决定为准。

tw.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

tw.description:
《Way of the Hunter》將推出手機端系列首作，太平洋西北地區的壯美景觀隨之鋪陳眼前。

在美國內茲珀斯谷的廣闊開放世界中，體驗最真實的狩獵與探索。在风景如画的自然栖息地中发现栩栩如生的动物，使用各种细节逼真的武器。

《獵人征途》的野生動物外型真實而美麗，且具備符合現實的動物群體行為特徵，提供玩家全面且真實的狩獵體驗，讓人能完全沉浸在遊戲世界。親眼目睹複雜多樣的生態環境產生的變化，周遭環境會因為你的行動而出現變動及反應。瞭解真正的獵人所代表的意義，並充分運用自己的技能來戰勝考驗。

面對人道狩獵的挑戰、搭配引人入勝的故事情節進行遊戲，或是單純地在這富饒的自然環境中自由狩獵。

* 數十種細節精緻的動物物種與真實的行為模式，為你帶來真正身歷其境的狩獵體驗
* 醒目標示動物跡象、血跡分析，以及能夠倒回觀看子彈鏡頭的射擊回顧畫面，這些功能都能讓您像專業獵人一樣狩獵
* 使用獵人感官將重要詳情和資訊醒目標示出來，或者關閉獵人感官，讓遊戲體驗更具挑戰性
* 複雜的戰利品系統，其會根據身體素質與年齡等多項因素產生獨一無二的鹿角和動物頭角
* 細膩又自然的動物動作，以及動物察覺到玩家存在時的真實反應
* 24 小時的日夜循環，再加上風和天氣的變化
* 真實彈道與子彈物理模擬
* 大量槍枝和裝備選擇，其中包含證照管制裝備，例如：Bushnell、Federal、Leupold、Primos、Remington 和 Steyr Arms
* 遊戲內的經營模式讓玩家可以獵取野味之後，將販賣肉品所得的資金用於購買新裝備、狩獵通行證以及戰利品狩獵台上的標本
* 引人入勝的故事情節，訴說著一段關於家族狩獵事業的掙扎糾葛，以及圍繞其間的競爭關係和友誼
* 直觀的相片模式，讓你可以捕捉並分享自己最愛的瞬間
* 使用手柄或觸控控制追蹤獵物
* 優化手機端操控，兼顧舒適與效率

警告：
不支援記憶體小於 4 GB 的裝置！
您需要至少 6 GB 記憶體的裝置才能使用最高圖形設定。

tw.description:
Learn German Through What You Already Know - With English and Dutch as Your Bridges

Transform your German learning with WordBridge DE - the app that revolutionizes how you approach German by activating your existing English knowledge and using Dutch as a stepping stone! Based on proven Intercomprehension research, WordBridge DE uses Dutch as the perfect bridge between English and German, making your learning journey faster and more natural than ever.

THE SCIENCE BEDIND OUR GERMANIC BRIDGE METHOD
Our approach is rooted in Intercomprehension research, which reveals systematic connections between related languages. Instead of starting from scratch, discover how much German you can already understand! By using Dutch as an intermediate step, we help you identify "transfer bases" - vocabulary, grammar patterns, and pronunciation rules that flow naturally from English through Dutch to German.

HOW THE BRIDGE METHOD WORKS FOR YOU
* Cognate Recognition: Unlock German words instantly through the English→Dutch→German pathway (English "water" → Dutch "water" → German "Wasser")
* Pattern Transfer: Use familiar English structures, refined through Dutch patterns, to understand German sentence building naturally
* Sound Bridges: Master German pronunciation through Dutch stepping stones that share English vocabulary but follow German-like sound rules
* Context Building: Leverage your cultural knowledge across all three Germanic languages to comprehend authentic German texts

WHY DUTCH MAKES THE DIFFERENCE
Dutch shares thousands of words with English while following grammatical patterns closer to German. This makes it the ideal bridge language:
* English "house" → Dutch "huis" → German "Haus"
* English "make" → Dutch "maken" → German "machen"
* English "think" → Dutch "denken" → German "denken"

COMPLETE LEARNING ECOSYSTEM
* Interactive Bridge Texts: Engaging German content that shows live connections through Dutch to English for levels A1-A2
* Phonetics Lab: Master German pronunciation and compare with  English and Dutch sound patterns
* Grammar Bridge Spotlight: Build German sentences interactively while discovering how sentence structures relate across German, Dutch, and English
* Bridge Vocabulary Trainer: Learn efficiently by understanding how words connect across all three Germanic languages
* False Friends Mastery: Avoid common pitfalls with context-based exercises across the language family

KEY FEATURES
* Quadrilingual support: German-Dutch-English-Chinese translations
* Complete pronunciation support: Professional native audio for all German lesson texts, with on-device speech output for Dutch, English, and Chinese
* Research-based methodology: Proven Germanic intercomprehension techniques that accelerate comprehension
* Self-paced learning: Perfect for independent study or classroom support
* Interactive exercises: Including bridge puzzles, quizzes, and pronunciation practice 

WHO BENEFITS
* English speakers beginning German (A1-A2 level): Experience breakthrough comprehension through familiar connections
* Students in DaF (German as a Foreign Language) courses: Supplement traditional methods with systematic language family insights
* Self-learners wanting an evidence-based approach: Understand the "why" behind German through linguistic connections
* Anyone tired of memorizing without understanding: Discover patterns instead of drilling isolated facts
* Language enthusiasts: Explore the fascinating connections within the Germanic language family

STOP MEMORIZING AND START RECOGNIZING! 
WordBridge DE shows you that learning German isn't about starting over - it's about building bridges from what you already know.
Download today and experience the power of Germanic language bridging - where every German word you learn connects to knowledge you already have!

tw.description:
本作品需全程連線。完整主線內容為十六集全集，包含已購買的【第一至二集】，及需要購買才能解鎖的【第三至十六集】。

你可能從沒玩過這樣的遊戲 —— 你當主角，真人互動的宮廷冒險遊戲！《隱形守護者》團隊全新力作《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》之媚娘篇，誠摯邀請您踏上驚險刺激的東方宮廷權謀之旅。

全程4K真人明星演繹
全程真人演繹實景搭建，由官鴻、黃羿、姚弛、林小宅、梓渝、圻夏夏等知名演員傾情出演。4K高畫質影片，為你帶來前所未有的沉浸體驗。你將置身於充滿東方特色的宮廷盛景，感受最真實的古代風情。

你的選擇，決定全員命運
感受影視與遊戲完美結合的獨特魅力。在這裡，你的選擇，將決定所有人的命運！然而，一次對他人的輕信，也可能讓你跌入萬丈深淵……誰在利用你，誰又可以為你所用？

生存與權力的冒險
體驗多線分支劇情和超高死亡率的挑戰，你能否憑藉魅力、智慧與膽識，從無名之輩走向權力巔峰？但在一切開始之前……你必須先活下去。

探索鮮為人知的宮廷祕史
森嚴宮規下暗藏著人們最深的慾望、陰謀與祕密。皇子和樂人不可告人的祕密，公主與她的愛人，冷宮中消散不去的鬼影……這一切將由你親手揭開。

可多次遊玩探索
本作劇情豐富，製作時長達500分鐘，其中的眾多選擇構成了獨一無二的你。在故事的終點，你將獲得一份專屬個性測試報告。主線之外，還能收集精緻的中式風格道具，解鎖隱藏劇情，點亮成就系統，替喜愛或討厭的角色衝榜——全球人氣榜單桂冠由你決定！

關於New One Studio
我們是深耕於全動態影像作品的獨立創作者團隊，致力結合東方文化與互動敘事，為您打造跨越文化壁壘的沉浸體驗。2019年，《隱形守護者》中非線性的敘事和扣緊人性抉擇的深度思考，讓我們獲得英國電影學院獎（BAFTA）的獎項肯定與數百萬用戶的情感共鳴。如今，我們以古代傳奇故事為靈感，打造《女王的遊戲：盛世天下》。《媚娘篇》聚焦於傳奇女王的起點：看她如何從無名少女，在危機四伏的宮廷中步步為營，憑著智慧與膽識在致命的權力鬥爭中存活下來，並逐漸展露頭角。這是她成為女王前，最驚心動魄的蟄伏歲月。你在這裡做出的每一個選擇，都將是她日後登上權力顛峰的基石。後續篇章內容正在精心製作中。敬請期待！

The planetary hours are based on an ancient astrological system, the Chaldean order of the planets.
Planetary hours are controlled by the 7 visible planets of the Solar system. In the Chaldaical order planets are arranged in the following sequence: Saturn, Jupiter, Mars, Sun, Venus, Mercury and Moon. Each planet controls the hour, which belongs to it accordingly.
Every planet has its own individual characteristics and energy, which clearly show themselves during the associated hour.
Considering spheres of planetary influence, particular matters, which are implemented on certain planetary hours come out for better or for worse.
Choose a favorable time for making your plans, while considering the planet hours, and you will stay successful and happy!

This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock.

You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama!

Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance
Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace.

Your Choices Shape History
This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return?

Survive to Rule
Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it.

Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets
Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery.

Multiple Playthroughs
With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests!

About New One Studio
We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned!

tr.description:
RadarScope is an AMS-award-winning weather visualization tool that empowers meteorologists, public safety officials, storm spotters, and weather enthusiasts to view a full suite of single-site radar data and related severe weather products. Your initial purchase provides professional radar visualization in a fully native app, free from distracting and invasive practices, with optional subscription packages to add even more capabilities.

Whether you’re scanning for a mesocyclone’s tell-tale hook echo, pinpointing the landfall of a hurricane’s eye wall, or identifying velocity couplet, hail spike, or debris ball signatures, RadarScope displays native radar data in its original radial format. You see what the radar sees almost as soon as the radar sees it, with automatic updates every two to ten minutes depending on the radar’s scanning strategy.

Your initial app purchase includes the following:

• Full suite of single-site radar products for the US, Canada, Guam, Denmark, Finland, and Germany
• 6-frame radar loops
• Two built-in providers for radar data
• Tornado, thunderstorm, flash flood, marine, snow squall, extreme wind, tropical, and other warnings in the US
• Selected severe weather warnings in Canada and Australia
• NWS-generated storm tracks with hail, TVS, and mesocyclone attributes
• Inspector and distance tools
• Color palette options for radar data
• AllisonHouse data plan integration
• Spotter Network integration for storm and location reporting
• mPING integration for submitting weather reports to NSSL
• Bundled maps with political boundaries, water bodies, and major highways, optimized for low-bandwidth use
• Support for widgets and complications
• Universal app for Apple platforms, including Apple Watch and Apple TV
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier One is an optional annual subscription that adds more features for tracking severe weather:

• 30-frame radar loops
• Cloud-to-ground lightning strikes
• Severe weather watches in the US and Canada
• Special weather statements in the US and Canada
• Mesoscale convective and precipitation discussions
• SPC convective, tornado, hail, wind, and fire outlooks
• WPC excessive rainfall outlooks in the US
• Local storm reports in the US
• Custom color palette support
• Multi-pane display (2 on phones; 4 on larger devices)
• Family Sharing support

RadarScope Pro Tier Two is an optional annual or monthly subscription that transforms RadarScope into a more complete visualization tool for a larger suite of weather products, including:

• Everything in Pro Tier One
• 50-frame radar loops
• A third provider for US radar data
• NEXRAD Level II radar data for the US with a 30-year historical archive
• Historical NEXRAD Level III, super-res, and non-US radar data with a 30-day archive
• Historical NWS bulletins with a 19-year archive
• GOES East and GOES West satellite products
• NSSL’s Multi-Radar Multi-Sensor (MRMS) products
• NCEP’s Real-Time Mesoscale Assimilation (RTMA) products
• Surface observations
• Atmospheric soundings in the US
• Hail size, hail probability, and azimuthal shear contours with a 30-day archive
• More detailed transportation and satellite imagery maps
• Custom color palette support for GOES, MRMS, and RTMA
• Server-sent events for radar and warning updates
• Cross-platform subscription sharing on up to 5 devices
• Family sharing support

If you choose to buy a RadarScope Pro subscription, it will be charged to your App Store account. The subscription will be auto-renewed within 24 hours prior to the end of the current period at the same price you originally paid. Subscriptions may be managed and auto-renewal disabled via your App Store account settings after the purchase. Once purchased, the subscription cannot be canceled during the active subscription period.

DTN is committed to safeguarding your privacy online. Our privacy policy is available for review at https://www.dtn.com/privacy-policy/

Please visit our web site for more information.

tr.description:
This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock.

You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama!

Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance
Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace.

Your Choices Shape History
This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return?

Survive to Rule
Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it.

Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets
Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery.

Multiple Playthroughs
With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests!

About New One Studio
We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned!

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@roadtoempressen
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
X: https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Discord: https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

Aproveite a primeira entrada da série móvel Way of the Hunter, ambientada no belo noroeste do Pacífico norte-americano.

Esta experiência de caça autêntica deixa você caçar e explorar ambientes abertos enormes nos Nez Perce Valleys dos Estados Unidos. Encontre animais realistas em belos habitats naturais e utilize diversas réplicas detalhadas de armas.

Way of the Hunter oferece uma experiência altamente imersiva e integrada, com vida selvagem deslumbrante e comportamento realista dos grupos de animais. Testemunhe as transformações em ecossistemas complexos, que reagem e se adaptam ao que você fizer. Aprenda a caçar de verdade e ponha suas habilidades à prova.

Enfrente os desafios da caça ética com uma história cativante, ou simplesmente divirta-se caçando em ambientes deslumbrantes.

* Dezenas de espécies incrivelmente detalhadas com comportamentos realistas para proporcionar uma experiência de caça verdadeiramente imersiva.
* Cace como um profissional com recursos que destacam sinais de animais e analisam respingos de sangue. Analise a trajetória dos seus disparos com a câmera rebobinável.
* Use seu sentido de caçador para destacar detalhes e informações importantes, ou desative-o.
* O complexo sistema de troféus gera chifres exclusivos com base em vários fatores, como estado físico e idade das caças.
* Animações e reações de animais naturais e sofisticadas ao sentir a presença dos jogadores.
* Ciclos de dia e noite com 24 horas, além de vento e clima variáveis.
* Simulação realística de balística e de física de projéteis.
* Grande seleção de armas de fogo e equipamentos, incluindo itens licenciados das empresas Bushnell, Federal, Leupold, Primos, Remington e Steyr Arms.
* A economia do jogo permite a você caçar e vender a carne para comprar mais equipamentos, licenças de caça e serviços de taxidermia para seus troféus.
* Uma história cativante sobre os obstáculos enfrentados por uma empresa familiar de caça e a rivalidade e amizades que a cercam.
* Modo de fotografia intuitivo, para capturar e compartilhar seus momentos favoritos.

Dungeon and Puzzles is a game that challenges players' 2D spatial perception and logical thinking. A player can use a sword to attack monsters, or a bow and an arrow to destroy enemies from afar. Pushing the obstacles back with a shield and pulling the monsters with a pair of special gloves.

There are 150 handcrafted rooms in the dungeon. Players will have to get a better understanding of the game to solve the puzzles and clear the rooms.

To beat the puzzles with fewer moves, achieving advanced goals, players will have to try different tactics and move combinations to find an optimized solution for the room. Sometimes a player would need to put the old solution aside and take on a new perspective towards the problem, reexamine and rethink before making a move.

Features:
● Dungeon + Puzzle + Sokoban
● 150 handcrafted rooms
● Fantasy themed pixel art
● Non-linear dungeon map

pt.description:
What were your childhood games like?

Onboard on an epic adventure of more than 20 hours through video games history filled with a ton of funny classical games references.

From 2D RPG, through 3D vs fight to a shooter, a trading card game and more you’ll get your fill of jumping from a game genre to another, never bored.

“Evoland 2: A slight case of spacetime continuum disorder” is not only one game but many, backboned with a story that will make you travel through time, discovering different art styles and video gaming technology.

Released first on PC with 500.000 copies shipped, we’re proud to share with you this experience carefully adapted for mobile devices.  

« It’s a mashup on a grand scale — and a successful one — bringing together many of the elements that make us love all those games individually. » - 9/10 GamesBeat

“Evoland 2 manages to seamlessly blend an incredible number of genres into a single, wonderful experience.”
4/5 – Hardcoregamer

Compatible with MFI controllers. 

If you experience any problem with Evoland 2, please contact our customer support at hello@playdigious.com and give us as much as possible information on your problem.

If you love music and want to master your bass guitar in perfection like Richard Bona, Stanley Clarke, John Patitucci, Billy Sheehan, Victor Wooten, Gary Willis, or even better, then you just need to have this app!!!

Demo video: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2LPNsS2F6bs

This app is a great collection of bass guitar modes, that gives you an excellent original material for improvisations and solo on the bass! Bass Modes Symmetry School is a triple horizontal system, in which modes are played with three notes on each string. Today many progressive bass guitarists use the wide extended fingering instead of usual traditional. This school presents "horizontal-extended" fingering, that helps you to perform modes in 1-2 octaves bound. The material in this school is also irreplaceable if you want to master a shredding bass technique. The app will be useful as for beginners, so for professionals!

●●●●● Bass Modes Symmetry School features: 
--------------------------------------
- 3-notes-per-string approach works perfectly for bass
- Easy learning of modes
- Ability to achieve fast performance speed (●SHREDDING●)
- Theoretical and practical usage for guitar, bass and piano players
- Given material works best with jazz but also can be used for latin, pop, funk, rock, etc. 
- This school will work for a beginner as well as for intermediate and advanced players. 

●●●●● App Features: 
------------------ 
● 322 + 23 (new) types of different bass modes, which can be easily transposed, resulting in about 3,800 of total modes!
● Harmony feature: you can see and listen to the chords, over which given modes can be played. More information about these chords you can find in our "International Guitar Chords 1 & 2" apps 
● Every mode is provided with corresponding optimal fingerings for your comfort 
● Transpose modes to any desired key by dragging notes on the screen with your finger
● Metrotone with adjustable tempo and time signature can be used as a trainer
● 5 different Metrotone click sounds at your choice
● Cursor can display note names or fingering (selectable) 
● Notes can display note names or fingering (selectable)
● Sharp and flat signatures correspond to the current mode's key  
● Fast cycled playback of modes with adjustable tempo
● Slow step-by-step playback of modes for easier learning 
● Six selectable harmony timbres to choose from 
● Stereo Chorus FX for harmony chords at your choice
● Reverb effect, applied to bass guitar and harmony (adjustable)
● designed both for iPhone and iPad

● iOS 10 and up compatible

pt.description:
Halls of Torment é um jogo de sobrevivência contra hordas com um visual retrô pré-renderizado, reminiscente dos RPGs dos anos 90. Escolha um dos muitos personagens heróis e desça aos Mortais Salões da Tormenta. Lute contra horrores profanos do além e sobreviva a onda após onda de inimigos até enfrentar um dos Senhores atormentados.

Fortaleça seu herói com características, habilidades e itens. Crie uma nova construção poderosa a cada partida. Explore diversas expansões subterrâneas e encontre novos itens poderosos que permitem aventurar-se ainda mais no abismo.

Primeiramente disponível no Steam, o roguelike RPG de sobrevivência estilo anos 90, Halls of Torment, agora faz sua estreia no mobile!

【Características】
◆ Corridas rápidas e casuais de 30 minutos
◆ Estilo de arte pré-renderizado à moda antiga
◆ Progressão meta baseada em missões
◆ Grande seleção de habilidades, características e itens diversos, permitindo criar sinergias interessantes
◆ Chefes diversos com mecânicas e padrões de ataque únicos
◆ Vários personagens distintos que permitem diferentes estilos de jogo
◆ Desbloqueie e explore vários mundos subterrâneos interessantes e desafiadores
◆ Itens únicos podem ser enviados para o mundo superior e usados para personalizar futuras partidas
◆ Crie tinturas mágicas para direcionar o destino a seu favor
◆ Desbloqueie o poder de cada classe e combine-os com o personagem escolhido

【Lista Completa de Conteúdo】

◆ 13 personagens jogáveis e marcas de personagem
◆ 20+ bênçãos para te fortalecer em cada partida

Nossa lista de conteúdo ainda está crescendo, espere mais no futuro!

pt.description:
As horas planetárias são baseadas em um sistema astrológico antigo, a ordem caldeu dos planetas.
As horas planetárias são controladas pelos 7 planetas visíveis do sistema solar. Na ordem caldaica, os planetas são organizados na seguinte sequência: Saturno, Júpiter, Marte, Sol, Vênus, Mercúrio e Lua. Cada planeta controla a hora, que pertence a ele de acordo.
Todo planeta tem suas próprias características e energia individuais, que se mostram claramente durante a hora associada.
Considerando as esferas de influência planetária, assuntos particulares, implementados em determinadas horas planetárias, saem para melhor ou para pior.
Escolha um momento favorável para fazer seus planos, considerando as horas do planeta, e você permanecerá bem-sucedido e feliz!

pt.description:
Fuja dos seus medos de infância

Disponível primeiramente para PC e consoles, o conto de aventuras de terror Little Nightmares agora está disponível para dispositivos móveis!
Mergulhe em Little Nightmares, um conto sombrio e extravagante que confrontará você com seus medos de infância!
Ajude Six a escapar da Bocarra, um navio vasto e misterioso habitado por almas corrompidas em busca da próxima refeição.
Conforme você avança na jornada, explore a casa de bonecas mais perturbadora que oferece uma prisão de onde fugir e um parquinho cheio de segredos para descobrir.
Reconecte-se com sua criança interior para soltar a imaginação e encontrar a saída!
Little Nightmares apresenta uma mistura sutil de ação, mecânica de plataforma e quebra-cabeças enraizada em uma direção artística misteriosa e design de som assustador.
Esgueire-se para fora do labirinto sombrio da Bocarra e fuja dos habitantes corrompidos para fugir dos seus medos de infância.

RECURSOS

- Ande com cuidado em uma aventura obscura e emocionante
- Redescubra seus medos de infância dentro de uma embarcação assombrada e escape dos habitantes misteriosos dela
- Escale, rasteje e esconda-se em ambientes horripilantes para solucionar enigmas difíceis de plataforma
- Mergulhe na Bocarra com o design de som assustador

REDESENHADO CUIDADOSAMENTE PARA DISPOSITIVOS MÓVEIS

pt.description:
This work requires a constant internet connection. The full content consists of all 16 chapters, including chapters 1-2 (already purchased) and chapters 3-16 which need to be purchased to unlock.

You've never played anything like this before—Road to Empress I, a cinematic palace challenge where your move shapes the palace drama!

Full 4K Live-Action Star-Studded Performance
Watch real drama unfold through the eyes of talented actors performing on lavishly crafted sets. Featuring Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo, Hana Lin, Zi Yu, Qi Xiaxia, and an ensemble cast who bring the imperial court to life in breathtaking 4K detail. Everything has been meticulously recreated to pull you deep into the heart of ancient China's most glorious palace.

Your Choices Shape History
This is where film meets gaming in perfect harmony. Every choice matters. One moment of misplaced trust could send you spiraling into betrayal and death. Who's manipulating you? Who can you manipulate in return?

Survive to Rule
Rising from obscurity to ultimate power out of multiple deadly story branches takes cunning, charm, and wisdom. The crown awaits... if you live long enough to claim it.

Uncover the Palace's Darkest Secrets
Behind the golden facade of the imperial court lies a web of forbidden desires, deadly conspiracies, and buried truths. The Prince's secret affair with the court bard, the Princess's hidden lover, the vengeful spirits haunting the abandoned Cold Palace... Every scandal of the ancient dynasty awaits your discovery.

Multiple Playthroughs
With over 8 hours of cinematic content, no two playthroughs are alike. Your choices don't just change the story; they define who you become. Earn a personalized Trait Sketch based on your decisions, collect beautiful traditional artifacts, unlock hidden storylines, and crown your favorite characters in global popularity contests!

About New One Studio
We are an independent creative team focused on crafting full-motion video experiences that blend Eastern culture with interactive storytelling. Our goal is to create immersive experiences that cross cultural boundaries. In 2019, The Invisible Guardian received BAFTA recognition and connected with millions through its non-linear narrative and deep exploration of moral choices. Now we return with "Road to Empress," weaving the ancient dynasty legends into an interactive experience that bridges cultures and centuries. Step into our world of palace intrigue, where ancient wisdom meets modern storytelling, and every choice echoes through history. Inspired by the ancient dynasty legends, we create Road to Empress I. Chapters 1-16 dive into the empress's legendary beginnings. Watch an unknown girl proceed with caution in palace crawling with enemies, using extraordinary wit and remarkable courage to outlast brutal power struggles, slowly making her name. These are the most nail-biting years—calm before storm, plotting rise while staying under radar. Every move sets stage for her ultimate climb to power pyramid's top. More chapters under development. Stay tuned!
